attributes: c. 1980s • Made in Korea • All-Over Sequin • 100% Poly
condition_notes: Labeled F&M Fashion "Jeongmin", 100% polyester; Korean maker + all-poly + older-style label date it to the 1980s (Korea was the era's garment-export hub before China). No size tag — size by measurement. Ribbed collar, cuffs, hem; sequins intact. Sold as found.

square.dedup_note: 2026-06-20: consolidated duplicate Square listing. The same physical jacket had a second Square item (RG-APPAREL-JEONGMIN, object IFS3NKQGBABCMP7CLIE3E3ND, $45, created 2026-06-17) minted before RG-0024 (2026-06-19) without a dedupe check. Moved that listing's photo (image D2AQK25S4RHO2MQHJOQ6RJM6) onto RG-0024 and archived the duplicate (is_archived=true, ecom_visibility=UNAVAILABLE). Canonical price reconciled to $48 (per 2026-06-19 reprice).

ebay.note: active; Jeongmin bomber jacket. Repriced 55→48 on 2026-06-19 (absorption-adjusted, BPO §3).
